arts.sum: Chelsea and Bayern Munich are reportedly engaged in “ongoing” talks over the possibility of Christopher Nkunku and Mathys Tel swapping clubs in the January transfer window. The Blues seem more active in the outgoings department this month, as evident from speculation surrounding Renato Veiga’s exit. arts.sum: Jadon Sancho was persona non grata at Man United after a spat with Erik ten Hag, however, Enzo Maresca is delighted with his attitude and application since joining Chelsea on loan in the summer. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Bournemouth predicted as Premier League classic unfolds
arts.sum: After putting an end to their winless run on the weekend, Chelsea will be looking to pick up a much-needed three points against Bournemouth in the Premier League later today. The victory ended the Blues' four-game winless run across all competitions, and Enzo Maresca will be hoping his side can build on the weekend's win when they welcome Bournemouth to Stamford Bridge.
